description: Published shape of the per-issue evidence timeline export. Informational and non-authoritative for live decisions; live operator surfaces such as status and explain use fresh GitHub facts.

additiveChanges: Adding new optional entry fields or new enum values is additive and backward-compatible.
breakingChanges: Removing or renaming an entry field, or changing required semantics, is a breaking change.
compatibilityPolicy.stabilityLimit: This contract does not claim runtime enforcement beyond the existing IssueRunTimelineExport runtime.
